title: Rob Bradley
compiled_truth: Rob Bradley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-14 to 2001-11-29), Rob Bradley sent 67 and received 525 emails, totalling 592 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (39), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (18), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (16), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (14), [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (12).
